CausalGAN (Structural Equation GAN)

Source: R/causalDeepNet.R
causalGAN.Rd

CausalGAN models \(X \rightarrow T \rightarrow Y\) with node-wise generators: \(G_X(\epsilon_X)\), \(G_T(X, \epsilon_T)\), \(G_Y(X, T, \epsilon_Y)\). A global discriminator scores the full joint \((X, T, Y)\) while auxiliary labellers regularize each causal component to improve structural equation fidelity and interventional calibration.

Usage

causalGAN(
  X,
  treatment,
  y,
  hidden_dim = 128L,
  noise_x = NULL,
  noise_t = 4L,
  noise_y = 4L,
  epochs = 300L,
  batch_size = 128L,
  lr_g = 2e-04,
  lr_d = 2e-04,
  lambda_label = 0.5,
  label_smooth = 0.9,
  verbose = TRUE,
  device = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

X

Covariate matrix or data.frame.

treatment

Binary treatment 0/1.

y

Outcome vector.

hidden_dim

Hidden dimension for all MLPs (default 128).

noise_x

Noise dimension for \(G_X\) (default ncol(X)).

noise_t

Noise dimension for \(G_T\) (default 4).

noise_y

Noise dimension for \(G_Y\) (default 4).

epochs

Number of training epochs (default 300).

batch_size

Batch size (default 128).

lr_g

Learning rate for generator (default 2e-4).

lr_d

Learning rate for discriminator/labellers (default 2e-4).

lambda_label

Weight of labeller loss relative to GAN loss (default 0.5).

label_smooth

Smoothed real label for BCE (default 0.9).

verbose

If TRUE, print progress every 50 epochs.

device

Device for torch: "cuda", "cpu", or NULL (default: CUDA if available, else CPU).

...

Ignored.

Value

Object of class causalGAN. Use predict() for interventional samples and ITE.

References

CausalGAN notebook in this package (causal_gan.ipynb).

See also

RCausalML-package

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Basic usage
# causalGAN(...)
} # }
